name: finance-organizer
description: Onboarding-driven personal + small-business finance organizer. An interview captures the user's company structure, sets of books, account map, personal/business overlap, locality/tax profile, and branding into a per-user config; then Finance Inbox triage & filing and a configurable ledger (Beancount or a simple spreadsheet) run off that config. Optional modules: related-party & reimbursements, health/benefit claims, one-off payment plans, bill reminders (recurring statement due dates + minimum payments → calendar), and brand-aware outputs. Learns as it goes, asking before saving anything new to memory.
